name: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
description: The product does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes user-controllable input before it is placed in output used as a web page served to other users, allowing attackers to inject executable scripts that run in victims' browsers.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that flows to an EGRESS node generating HTML/web output without passing through a CONTROL node that performs context-appropriate output encoding (HTML entity, JavaScript, URL encoding)
